info.title: Willet Cloud REST API
info.description: REST surface mirroring the Willet MCP tools. Authenticated with a Bearer API secret (wlt_...) minted in the dashboard. Reads use GET; writes use POST/PATCH/DELETE. Read-only secrets are limited to GET; project-scoped secrets may only address routes under their own project id.

get.summary: Identity and scope of the authenticated token

get.description: Mirrors the list_tickets MCP tool. Items are verbosity-projected ticket objects.

get.summary: Get a ticket with comments and links

delete.summary: Delete a ticket and all its related data

post.summary: Move a ticket back to the open queue
Add a comment to a ticket

get.summary: Get a ticket's link graph up to N hops
Render a ticket dependency graph (text tree + nodes/edges)

delete.summary: Remove a link between two tickets
delete.description: Identifies the link via a JSON request body. Some proxies strip DELETE bodies; ensure your client sends it.

get.summary: Ticket counts grouped by status, type, and priority
List tags in use with their ticket counts
Render a kanban board (markdown) grouped by status, priority, or type

patch.summary: Update an organization's name or slug

delete.summary: Permanently delete an organization and all its projects

get.summary: List members and pending invitations for an organization

post.summary: Create an invitation link to an organization

patch.summary: Change a member's role in an organization

delete.summary: Remove a member from an organization

post.summary: Create a project in an organization

delete.summary: Schedule a project for deletion (30-day retention)

get.summary: List members assigned to a project

post.summary: Add an organization member to a project

patch.summary: Change a member's role on a project

delete.summary: Remove a member from a project

get.summary: List GitHub repositories linked to a project

post.summary: Link a GitHub repository to a project

200.description: Recoverable outcome (e.g. already linked, GitHub not connected)

201.description: A new repository mapping was created

delete.summary: Unlink a GitHub repository from a project

bearerAuth.description: An API secret minted in the Willet dashboard, sent as `Authorization: Bearer wlt_...`.

TicketId.name: ticketId
TicketId.description: Ticket ULID or project-scoped key (e.g. WD-42).

QStatus.name: status
QStatus.description: Filter by one or more statuses.

QType.name: type
QType.description: Filter by one or more types.

QPriority.name: priority
QPriority.description: Filter by one or more priorities.

QTags.name: tags
QTags.description: Filter by one or more tags.

Unauthorized.description: Missing, malformed, revoked, or expired API secret.

Forbidden.description: The secret lacks permission (read-only on a write, wrong scope, insufficient role).

NotFound.description: The addressed resource does not exist.

Ticket.description: A ticket. `key`/`number` are present once the project has a key prefix; `similar_tickets` may appear on create.

TicketView.description: A verbosity-projected ticket. `short` returns id, title, status, type, priority, estimate, tags, due_date, assignee; `detailed` returns the full ticket with a truncated description; `full` returns the complete ticket. Always includes `key`/`number` when available, and `score` on search results.

TicketDetail.description: A verbosity-projected ticket plus a `comments` array (TicketComment[]) and a `links` array (TicketLink[]), and optionally `history` (TicketHistory[]) and `subtickets` (TicketView[]) when requested via the include_history / include_subtickets query flags.

GithubRepoList.description: `{ count: number, repos: GithubRepo[] }` — the GitHub repositories linked to the project.

GithubLinkResult.description: On success: { ok: true, mapping_id, repo, message } or { ok: true, already_linked: true, mapping_id }. Recoverable failures carry an `error` discriminator (github_not_connected, insufficient_github_scope, github_org_restriction) with guidance fields.

GithubUnlinkResult.description: `{ ok: true, unlinked: "owner/repo" }` — the repository mapping that was removed.
